ValidationRule.description: Does not allow a Package to be created with Status Open if Project is closed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, ISPICKVAL( PackageStatus__c ,"Open"), ISPICKVAL( ProjectName__r.ProjectStatus__c ,"Closed") ) , AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, ISPICKVAL( PackageStatus__c ,"Open"), RecordType.DeveloperName ="Time", ISPICKVAL( ProjectName__r.ProjectStatus__c ,"PartiallOpenWOTimeEntry)") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Service Status can not be set to "Open" since the Project Status does not allow this. (PA023)
